channel.title: Summary on Andreis' Library
channel.description: Recent content in Summary on Andreis' Library

item.title: Summary: Post-Quantum Key Exchange (New Hope)
item.description: Andreis Gustavo Malta Purim¹ ¹ Institute of Computing, State University of Campinas in Campinas, São Paulo, Brazil. a213095@dac.unicamp.br http://web.eecs.umich.edu/~cpeikert/pubs/suite.pdf https://summerschool-croatia.cs.ru.nl/2018/slides/Introduction%20to%20post-quantum%20cryptography%20and%20learning%20with%20errors.pdf https://math.colorado.edu/~kstange/teaching-resources/crypto/RingLWE-notes.pdf https://asecuritysite.com/pqc/lwe_output https://eprint.iacr.org/2010/613.pdf https://eprint.iacr.org/2012/230.pdf https://eprint.iacr.org/2014/599.pdf https://security.googleblog.com/2016/07/experimenting-with-post-quantum.html https://asecuritysite.com/encryption/lwe3 https://asecuritysite.com/encryption/lwe2 https://asecuritysite.com/encryption/lwe https://github.com/scottwn/PyNewHope https://asecuritysite.com/pqc/newhope https://newhopecrypto.org/ https://www.usenix.org/conference/usenixsecurity16/technical-sessions/presentation/alkim
item.content:
Andreis Gustavo Malta Purim¹

¹ Institute of Computing, State University of Campinas in Campinas, São Paulo, Brazil. a213095@dac.unicamp.br

http://web.eecs.umich.edu/~cpeikert/pubs/suite.pdf https://summerschool-croatia.cs.ru.nl/2018/slides/Introduction%20to%20post-quantum%20cryptography%20and%20learning%20with%20errors.pdf https://math.colorado.edu/~kstange/teaching-resources/crypto/RingLWE-notes.pdf https://asecuritysite.com/pqc/lwe_output https://eprint.iacr.org/2010/613.pdf https://eprint.iacr.org/2012/230.pdf https://eprint.iacr.org/2014/599.pdf https://security.googleblog.com/2016/07/experimenting-with-post-quantum.html https://asecuritysite.com/encryption/lwe3 https://asecuritysite.com/encryption/lwe2 https://asecuritysite.com/encryption/lwe https://github.com/scottwn/PyNewHope https://asecuritysite.com/pqc/newhope https://newhopecrypto.org/ https://www.usenix.org/conference/usenixsecurity16/technical-sessions/presentation/alkim
